title: sideritis cretica var. eriocephala
intro: Sideritis cretica var. eriocephala, also known as Cretan ironwort or mountain tea, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Sideritis, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis cretica var. eriocephala include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, infusion, and capsules, making it accessible for those seeking to harness its medicinal properties.
